The function should process a list of musical notes and check if each note falls within the specified vocal range. The function will compare the note's pitch to the lower and upper bounds, ensuring that all notes are within the acceptable range. If any note exceeds the upper bound or falls below the lower bound, the function will return `False`. Otherwise, it will return `True`.
